battlenet.name: Battle.net
battlenet.notes: If Battle.net fails to launch after an update, delete the Battle.net.XXXXX folder from Program Files (x86)/Battle.net/

diablo4.name: Diablo IV
diablo4.notes: Requires D3DMetal for DirectX 12 support. Approximately 80GB disk space needed. Disable ray tracing for better performance. D3DMetal uses Wine builtins for d3d12/dxgi.

wow.name: World of Warcraft
wow.notes: Use DirectX 11 mode in game settings. Disable ray tracing. MSync recommended over ESync for this title.

overwatch2.name: Overwatch 2
overwatch2.notes: Competitive play may trigger anti-cheat. Use DirectX 11 render mode.

hearthstone.name: Hearthstone
hearthstone.notes: Runs perfectly. Lightweight game with no performance issues.

diablo2r.name: Diablo II: Resurrected
diablo2r.notes: Force DX11 via -dx11. d3d11/dxgi/d3d10core=builtin: loads DXMT from WINEDLLPATH (not system32 which has CrossOver D3DMetal-backed DLLs that fail without D3DMetal.framework). winegstreamer/mf disabled to avoid CX crash.

starcraft2.name: StarCraft II
starcraft2.notes: Runs very well. Set shader quality to medium for best FPS.

warcraft3.name: Warcraft III: Reforged
warcraft3.notes: Classic graphics mode works best. Reforged graphics may have rendering issues.

cod_mw.name: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare
cod_mw.notes: WARNING: Ricochet anti-cheat does NOT work under Wine. Single-player/campaign only. D3DMetal uses Wine builtins for d3d12/dxgi.
